title: closeSurface
description: Close one or more surfaces (Phase 1: background processes). Closing a surface that is not open is a no-op (PASS). Renames `stopProcess`.

anyOf.title: surface
anyOf.description: The surface a step acts on. Omit to act on the active surface. Phase 1 supports background processes; browser/app surfaces are added in later phases.

anyOf.title: Surface (by name)
anyOf.description: Name of the surface. A browser engine keyword (chrome|firefox|safari|webkit|edge) targets that browser; any other string names an existing surface, with its kind resolved at runtime.

process.description: Name of a background process started by a runShell/runCode `background` step.

byName.title: Surface (by name)
byName.description: Name of the surface. A browser engine keyword (chrome|firefox|safari|webkit|edge) targets that browser; any other string names an existing surface, with its kind resolved at runtime.

process.description: Name of a background process started by a runShell/runCode `background` step.
